chunk_summary.idea_trajectory_justification: The group is in the initial phase of introductions, where each participant is describing their own research area and potential contributions, setting the stage for future brainstorming.
chunk_summary.collective_engagement_justification: Most participants are visibly attentive, with frequent head nods and active listening postures observed throughout the introductions.
chunk_summary.cross_disciplinary_bridging_description: Larry Cheng connects his mechanical engineering background with electrical impedance tomography to complement MRI imaging.
chunk_summary.problem_specificity_justification: The discussion is currently at the topic-level, with participants introducing their respective fields and research interests.
chunk_summary.decision_crystallization_justification: The group is still in the early stage of sharing individual expertise and has not yet converged on a specific project idea.
chunk_summary.complementarity_recognition_quote: electrical impedance tomography to complement the MRI for the fast imaging capabilities
chunk_summary.notable_observation: The meeting began with a highly structured round-robin introduction process, which effectively established the disciplinary diversity of the group.

ideas_currently_on_table: Radiation detection for X-ray CT and PET
Light transport models for advanced detectors
chunk_summaries: The group began with a structured round-robin introduction where each participant shared their disciplinary background and research interests. The tone was professional and collaborative, with participants actively listening and identifying potential areas of complementarity. The group ended the chunk with a shared recognition of the diverse expertise present, setting the stage for future divergent brainstorming.
